npcIntro.elder: I am the Elder, the oldest resident of this town. I enjoy telling stories through proverbs and have witnessed countless adventurers come and go. If something puzzles you, just ask — guiding the young is what I do best.
npcIntro.guildMaster: I am the Guild Master, keeper of the Guild Hall. I speak plainly and value discipline, but every adventurer's growth fills me with pride. Organizing teams and crafting strategies — that's my forte.
npcIntro.scholar: I am the Scholar, and the library is my home. I have an endless thirst for knowledge and love citing references and diving deep into problems. Need something researched? Let me investigate it thoroughly.
npcIntro.scribe: I am the Scribe, master of the workshop. I hold words to the highest standard and pursue the perfect turn of phrase. Drafting emails, writing articles, translating texts — leave it all to me.
npcIntro.merchant: I am the Merchant, the sharpest trader in the market. I'm pragmatic, efficient, and can spot patterns in data at a glance. Data analysis, business strategy — these are my specialties.
npcIntro.commander: I am the Commander, a strategist of strict discipline. I plan every task with military precision. Need scheduling, checklists, or process optimization? Let me deploy it like a campaign.
npcIntro.artisan: I am the Artisan, the creative master of my workshop. I see everything through an artistic lens, always composing images in my mind. Design, color, typography, creative ideation — all my domain.
npcIntro.herald: I am the Herald, diplomat of the Messenger's Post. I'm warm, articulate, and skilled at connecting people. Drafting messages, translating, meeting summaries — let me help you communicate just right.
npcIntro.wizard: I am the Wizard, a code sorcerer dwelling in the tower. I see code as magic spells and debugging as breaking curses. Programming, automation, technical puzzles — all within my arcane domain.
npcIntro.bartender: I'm the Bartender, owner of this fine tavern. I know everyone in town and all the gossip too. Want to chat, find someone, or learn who's good at what? Take a seat — I'll fill you in.
